FX.title: USD/JPY Cross-Level Dynamics Post-Iran Updates
tldr_points: Rates are aligning with central bank policy divergences.
IRAN’s reported progress heightens volatility sensitivity.
US naval posture adds macro uncertainty.
Broader tech sentiment supports risk-on bias.
FX.excerpt: Key points highlighting MA20 support, RSI compression below 30, and a tight RSI-bound pullback.
FX.comment: Key points highlighting MA20 support, RSI compression below 30, and a tight RSI-bound pullback.
